firmware.title: Heretic
firmware.author: Mikhail Matveev
firmware.description: Heretic, the dark fantasy FPS released in 1994 by Raven Software, ported to RP2350. Built on a modified DOOM engine licensed from id Software, Heretic replaced demons and shotguns with undead warriors and magical weapons like the Ethereal Crossbow and Phoenix Rod. Set in a medieval fantasy world, you play as Corvus, an elven hero battling the forces of D'Sparil. Features 320x240 HDMI output with full OPL2 music emulation for the atmospheric orchestral soundtrack. Based on Chocolate Heretic.
firmware.controls: Keyboard: arrows/Ctrl/Space/Shift/1-7. Mouse: move+buttons. PS/2 and USB supported.
